assignments.name: emailBody
assignments.value:
=Hi {{ $json.Title }},

Welcome aboard! We're thrilled to have you join the RAH team. This is a sample welcome email for new hires — official content coming soon.

Your hire date on record: {{ $json.HireDate }}

If you have any questions before your first shift, please reach out.

Best regards,
RAH HR Team

assignments.name: emailBody
assignments.value:
=Hi {{ $json.Title }},

We hope your first shift went well! This is a sample first-shift follow-up email — official content coming soon.

Your start date on record: {{ $json.StartDate }}

We'd love to hear how things went. Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions or feedback.

Best regards,
RAH HR Team

assignments.name: emailBody
assignments.value:
=Hi {{ $json.Title }},

Congrats on completing 30 days with RAH! This is a sample 30-day check-in email — official content coming soon.

We'd love to hear how things are going. Please share any feedback, questions, or concerns.

Best regards,
RAH HR Team

assignments.name: emailBody
assignments.value:
=Hi {{ $json.Title }},

You've been with RAH for 60 days — fantastic! This is a sample 60-day check-in email — official content coming soon.

We'd love a quick update on how you're settling in. Any feedback is appreciated.

Best regards,
RAH HR Team

assignments.name: emailBody

=Hi {{ $json.Title }},
